title: trichomanes caespitosum
intro: Trichomanes caespitosum, also known as the rock cap fern, is a small, non-vascular, and perennial plant that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trichomanes caespitosum include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
